variables.label: Application
variables.input: smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields name | sort name asc

0.content:
# 📊 Cross-Device & Cross-Browser Experience Consistency

**Application:** Selected via dashboard variable | **SLO Standard:** Google Core Web Vitals P75 | **Data Source:** Gen 3 RUM (`user.events`)

This dashboard ensures **consistent performance and functionality across devices, browsers, operating systems, and regions**. It surfaces gaps in experience quality so teams can prioritise fixes that improve reliability and reduce QA effort.

| Section | What It Answers |
|---------|----------------|
| **Traffic Distribution** | Where are our visitors coming from? (device, browser, OS, country) |
| **Device Consistency** | Do mobile guests get the same performance as desktop? |
| **Browser Consistency** | Does Chrome perform differently from Safari or Firefox? |
| **OS Consistency** | Are iOS users impacted differently from Android or Windows? |
| **Geographic Consistency** | Do visitors in different countries experience slower server response? |
| **Error Consistency** | Are errors concentrated on specific device/browser combos? |
| **Viewport Analysis** | Does performance vary by screen size / responsive breakpoint? |

🟢 **Good** — meets CWV SLO    🟡 **Needs Work** — approaching threshold    🔴 **Poor** — failing SLO

1.query: data record(a="Traffic Distribution — Where Are Visitors Coming From?")

2.title: 📱 Sessions by Device Type
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{device.type}
| sort Sessions desc

3.title: 🌐 Sessions by Browser
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{browser.name}
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10

4.title: 💻 Sessions by Operating System
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{os.name}
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10

5.title: 🌍 Sessions by Country
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{geo.country.iso_code}
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10

6.query: data record(a="Device Type — Performance Consistency (Mobile vs Desktop vs Tablet)")

7.title: 📱 Core Web Vitals P75 by Device Type
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{device.type}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Device = device.type
| sort Sessions desc
| fields Device, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

8.title: 📈 LCP P75 by Device Type — 30-Day Trend (ms)
8.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d), device.type}
| makeTimeseries lcp_p75 = avg(lcp_p75), time:{day}, by:{device.type}, interval:1d

10.title: 🌐 Core Web Vitals P75 by Browser
10.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{browser.name}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Browser = browser.name
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10
| fields Browser, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

11.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d), browser.name}
| makeTimeseries lcp_p75 = avg(lcp_p75), time:{day}, by:{browser.name}, interval:1d

13.title: 💻 Core Web Vitals P75 by Operating System
13.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{os.name}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename OS = os.name
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 10
| fields OS, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

14.title: 📈 LCP P75 by Operating System — 30-Day Trend (ms)
14.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-30d
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint)
| summarize lcp_p75 = percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000, by:{day = bin(start_time, 1d), os.name}
| makeTimeseries lcp_p75 = avg(lcp_p75), time:{day}, by:{os.name}, interval:1d

15.query: data record(a="Geographic — Performance Consistency by Country")

16.title: 🌍 Core Web Vitals P75 by Country (min 10 sessions)
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{geo.country.iso_code}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Country = geo.country.iso_code
| filter Sessions >= 10
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 15
| fields Country, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, CLS_P75, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

17.title: 🖥️ TTFB P75 by Country — Slowest 10 (ms)
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| filter isNotNull(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte)
| summarize TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{geo.country.iso_code}
| filter Sessions >= 10
| sort TTFB_P75 desc
| limit 10
| fieldsRename Country = geo.country.iso_code

18.query: data record(a="Error Consistency — Are Errors Concentrated on Specific Devices or Browsers?")

19.title: ⚠️ Errors by Device Type
19.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Errors = count(), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{device.type}
| fieldsAdd Errors_Per_Session = round(toDouble(Errors) / toDouble(Sessions), decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Device = device.type
| sort Errors desc

20.title: ⚠️ Errors by Browser
20.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Errors = count(), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{browser.name}
| fieldsAdd Errors_Per_Session = round(toDouble(Errors) / toDouble(Sessions), decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Browser = browser.name
| sort Errors desc
| limit 10

21.title: 🔴 Top 20 Errors by Device + Browser Combination
21.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "error"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize Errors = count(), Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id), by:{device.type, browser.name, error.name, error.type}
| fieldsAdd Errors_Per_Session = round(toDouble(Errors) / toDouble(Sessions), decimals:2)
| fieldsRename Device = device.type, Browser = browser.name, Error = error.name, Type = error.type
| sort Errors desc
| limit 20
| fields Device, Browser, Type, Error, Errors, Sessions, Errors_Per_Session

22.query: data record(a="Viewport / Screen Size — Performance by Responsive Breakpoint")

23.title: 📐 Core Web Vitals P75 by Viewport Width Bucket
23.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| fieldsAdd viewport_bucket = if(browser.window.width <= 480, "≤480px (Phone)", else:if(browser.window.width <= 768, "481-768px (Tablet Portrait)", else:if(browser.window.width <= 1024, "769-1024px (Tablet/Small Desktop)", else:if(browser.window.width <= 1440, "1025-1440px (Desktop)", else:"≥1441px (Large Desktop)"))))
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    FCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.first_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{viewport_bucket}
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Viewport = viewport_bucket
| sort Sessions desc
| fields Viewport, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, FCP_P75, TTFB_P75

24.query: data record(a="Consistency Gap Analysis — Biggest Performance Differences")

25.title: 🔍 CWV by Device + Browser Combo — Worst Performers (min 10 sessions)
25.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    CLS_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)),
    by:{device.type, browser.name}
| filter Sessions >= 10
| fieldsAdd 
    LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    INP_SLO = if(INP_P75 <= 200.0, "✅", else:"❌"),
    CLS_SLO = if(CLS_P75 <= 0.1, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename Device = device.type, Browser = browser.name
| sort LCP_P75 desc
| limit 15
| fields Device, Browser, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, INP_P75, INP_SLO, CLS_P75, CLS_SLO

26.title: 📡 Performance by ISP / Network Provider (min 20 sessions)
26.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| lookup [smartscapeNodes "FRONTEND" | fields id_classic, name], sourceField:dt.rum.application.entity, lookupField:id_classic, prefix:"app."
| filter app.name == $app
| summarize 
    Sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    LCP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    TTFB_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.time_to_first_byte, 75) / 1000000),
    INP_P75 = toDouble(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75) / 1000000),
    by:{client.isp}
| filter Sessions >= 20
| fieldsAdd LCP_SLO = if(LCP_P75 <= 2500.0, "✅", else:"❌")
| fieldsRename ISP = client.isp
| sort Sessions desc
| limit 15
| fields ISP, Sessions, LCP_P75, LCP_SLO, TTFB_P75, INP_P75
